sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95909" key="sphlai/+ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπηλᾱΐτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n95909.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">worshipped in grottos</tr_>, of certain gods, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:10:32:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.32.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
